Main topics: dao based dApps, privacy, social products, real life usecases.6. Gno core contributions (gnovm, gno dev tools, daokit, debug, security, etc.)

The networks we are currently validating are the following: none

Our total AUM is: 0

Our organisation's coordinates: www.berty.tech; Discord handles: rems14, jefft0

Contact details: hello@berty.tech, Discord: https://discord.gg/bdxYJMM7Kt

We believe in gno.land's mission and, beyond our other contributions, we want to add our node to strengthen the resiliency of the network.

Our contributions to gno.land: Gno Native Kit framework, dSocial experimental mobile social media dApp, Gno Key Mobile and multiple PRs supporting the work of the Gno Core team. We documented our contributions in our journies posts: https://github.com/gnolang/hackerspace/issues/28, https://github.com/gnolang/hackerspace/issues/51, https://github.com/gnolang/hackerspace/issues/67, https://github.com/gnolang/hackerspace/issues/92

Contact details: info@onbloc.xyz, Discord: https://discord.gg/xsUbUwE9

We believe in gno.land's mission and, beyond our other contributions, we want to add our node to strengthen the resiliency of the network.

Our contributions to gno.land:
 - Development and operation of Adena Wallet, enabling secure on-chain interactions and seamless user access to Gno applications
 - Development and operation of Gnoscan, a block explorer providing transparency into transactions, blocks, and on-chain data
 - Development and operation of Gnoswap, a decentralized exchange (DEX) enabling permissionless token swaps and liquidity provisioning
